issues.title: Duplicate ORDER_STATUS_VALUES definition
issues.description: ORDER_STATUS_LIST is defined in constants.ts but the same values are duplicated in searchParams.ts as ORDER_STATUS_VALUES (lines 9-17). This creates maintenance burden - if status values change, both files must be updated.
issues.fix: Export ORDER_STATUS_LIST from constants.ts and import it in searchParams.ts. Change searchParams.ts line 22 to use: status: parseAsStringEnum<OrderStatus>(ORDER_STATUS_LIST)

issues.title: Duplicated row value building logic in export function
issues.description: Lines 47-63 (no items case) and lines 68-85 (with items case) both build nearly identical values arrays. They share ~10 duplicate lines (order.id, created_at, payment_status, buyer_email, seller_email, seller_display_name, currency, transfer_number, receipt_url). Only product_name and quantities differ.
issues.fix: Extract a helper function that builds common order row values. Pattern: function buildOrderRowValues(order: ReportOrder, item?: ReportOrderItem) that returns the common values array. Then call it from both branches with conditional item values.

issues.title: XML escape function could be reused
issues.description: escapeXml() function (lines 24-30) is a utility that should be considered for extraction to a shared utilities module if similar XML export functionality is needed elsewhere in the application.
issues.fix: If XML export patterns appear in 2+ other features, create apps/admin/src/shared/utils/xmlEscape.ts. Currently only 1 occurrence, so keep inline but note for future refactoring.

issues.title: Magic filter reset object created inline
issues.description: The filter reset object (lines 27-37) with all null values is created inline in handleClear(). If this reset pattern is used elsewhere, it should be a constant or utility function.
issues.fix: Create a constant in domain/constants.ts: export const EMPTY_REPORT_FILTERS: ReportFilters = { dateFrom: null, dateTo: null, status: null, ... }. Import and use it in ReportFiltersBar.

issues.title: Magic number for preview length lacks semantic constant
issues.description: ORDER_ID_PREVIEW_LENGTH = 8 is a magic number defined locally in ReportTable.tsx. If this preview length is used elsewhere (e.g., in exportOrdersToExcel.ts or other components), it should be centralized.
issues.fix: Move ORDER_ID_PREVIEW_LENGTH to domain/constants.ts and import it. Currently it's only used in ReportTable (line 71), but if used in export or elsewhere, centralize it.

issues.title: Magic number ISO_DATE_LENGTH lacks semantic meaning
issues.description: ISO_DATE_LENGTH = 10 is defined inline in handleExport() at line 35. This magic number (ISO 8601 date YYYY-MM-DD length) should be a named constant if used in multiple places.
issues.fix: Add to domain/constants.ts: export const ISO_DATE_LENGTH = 10. Import and use in ReportsPage.tsx line 38.

issues.title: Magic XML strings hardcoded
issues.description: XML template strings are hardcoded inline (lines 91-98) with magic values like worksheet name 'Sales Report' and XML namespaces. These should be constants for maintainability.
issues.fix: Extract to constants: export const XLSX_WORKSHEET_NAME = 'Sales Report', XLSX_HEADER_XML, XLSX_FOOTER_XML, etc. Or better: move all XML generation to a template module.

issues.title: Magic MIME type hardcoded in downloadExcel
issues.description: MIME type 'application/vnd.ms-excel;charset=utf-8;' is hardcoded as a magic string in downloadExcel() function. Should be a constant.
issues.fix: Add to constants.ts: export const EXCEL_MIME_TYPE = 'application/vnd.ms-excel;charset=utf-8;'. Import and use in exportOrdersToExcel.ts line 104.
